title: Origins: Liar
description: The Liar with it's wit and the power to disguise any item as another item. Trick your opponent and gain the upper hand! (Fabric)
body:
**Liar (for Fabric, Minecraft 1.20.2) impact: 1, Icon: Empty Map**

---

_"The Liar with it's wit and carefully crafted lies can deceive and gain the upper hand in any situation"_

- ### "Make Believe" (Primary Active Power):
_"Disguise The Item in your Mainhand into The Item in your Offhand with [Primary Active], press it again on a Disguised Item to revert it back"_
-  [-] Disguised Blocks cannot be Placed.
-  [-] Disguised Items while inside of an inventory, prevent the Player that is holding them from Crafting.
-  [-] Disguised Items while on the ground, stop nearby players from Crafting.
-  [-] The Bundle while inside of an inventory, prevent the Player that is holding them from Crafting.
-  [-] Disguised Items, such as food or Orbs of Origin, are prevented from being used.
-  [-] Any Disguised Armor appear like they give you armor points, but damage goes through them.
-  [+] Maybe you can trick your Opponent to wear some.
-  [+-] Disguised Weapons are not effective, but your Opponent does not know that.
-  [+] You can use Disguised Emeralds to fool Villagers and Traders. What they do not know does not hurt them.
